privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated DXF file populated with exactly 85 text entities using a fixed random seed. The input DXF path, expected output CSV path, ground truth file path, and expected count of 85 points are all explicitly verified to match the setup and verifier scripts exactly.
